title: Module 1
content:
Introduction to Functional Polymers: - Definition and classification of
functional polymers, Importance of functional polymers, Various synthesis
methods- -step-growth polymerisation, chain-growth polymerisation, ring-
opening polymerisation

title: Module 2
content:
Polymer Functionalisation: Chemical modification of polymers with suitable
examples,
Grafting
of
functional
groups
with
examples,
blockcopolymerisation with examples. Properties of functional polymers-
mechanical, thermal, electrical and optical

title: Module 3
content:
Applications of Functional Polymers:  biomedical applications, drug
delivary systems, water treatment, catalysis, electronics, coatings and
adhesives. Types of functional polymers with suitable examples- Hydrogels,
smart polymers, conductive polymers, biodegradable polymers, shape
memory polymers, self-healing polymers, water soluble polymers, stimuli
responsive polymers.

title: Module 4
content:
Characterisation of Functional Polymers- using microscopic techniques,
spectroscopic techniques, chramotographic techniques and thermal analysis.
Modelling and simulation of functional polymers using molecular dynamics
simulations, Monte Carlo simulations and finite element modelling.
